messages.content: Write a two-sentence welcome email for a new analytics customer.

Welcome to Acme Analytics — we’re excited to help your team turn product data into clearer decisions. Start by connecting your first data source, and our onboarding checklist will guide you through the rest.
Rewrite this support reply to be concise: We are extremely sorry that you are experiencing this issue and our engineering team is currently looking into it with a high degree of urgency.
Sorry about the issue — our engineering team is investigating urgently.
